7 Secrets To
A 6 Figure A Day
Sales Letter
...or...
How To Write A Sales Letter
That Breaks The Entire Internet
By Craig Clemens
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 1 of 8 --

1. Must Have A “James Bond Worthy” Opening
Example:
End Of America
“Texas Company Tapping 2.8 Trillion Oil Reserve...
Under The Eiffel Tower!”
Secret + Benefit + Curiosity
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 8 --

2. Must Have A
“You Can't Make This Shit Up”
Story
The Zeitgiest Movie
Sugar & Artificial Sweeteners
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 8 --

3. Must Appeal To The Majority Of Americans
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 8 --

4. Must Ride A Current Trend
Media, Google Trends
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 8 --

5. Must Have Massive Internal Credibility
Studies, doctor quotes, quotes from world leaders, charts,
graphs, facts
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 6 of 8 --

6. Must Still Have The Best Product – With Proof
Shlitz beer story
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 7 of 8 --

7. Must Pass “The Tab Test”
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 8 of 8 --
